```
    '生态设计原稿/07-插件系统架构.md',

    '生态设计原稿/19-SDK与协议.md',

    'Chips-SDK/README.md',
    'Chips-CardViewer/README.md',
    'Chips-BaseCardPlugin/richtext-BCP/README.md',
]
for fp in files:
    p=Path(fp)
    print(f'\n===== {fp} =====')
    if not p.exists():
        print('[missing]')
        continue
    text=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    print(text[:12000])
    if len(text)>12000:
        print('\n[truncated]')
PY]
```

```
from pathlib import Path

def print_range(path, start, end):
    print(f'\n===== {path}:{start}-{end} =====')
    lines = Path(path).read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines()
```

```
[bash -lc set -e
# 1) 清理旧版 Host 工作区中的已装插件与状态
chips plugin disable com.chips.card-viewer >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
chips plugin uninstall com.chips.card-viewer >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
chips plugin disable chips.basecard.richtext >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
chips plugin uninstall chips.basecard.richtext >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
chips stop >/dev/null 2>&1 || true

# 2) 卸载全局 CLI / Host 包
npm uninstall -g chips-host chips-sdk || true

# 3) 删除旧 Host 工作区
rm -rf "$HOME/.chips-host"

# 4) 输出清理后的状态
{
  echo 'which chips:'; which chips || true
  echo 'which chipsdev:'; which chipsdev || true
  echo 'volta list:'; volta list all || true
  echo 'workspace exists:'; [ -d "$HOME/.chips-host" ] && echo yes || echo no
}]
```

```
]
```

```
[bash -lc set -euo pipefail
HOST_TGZ="$PWD/release-artifacts/2026-03-09/chips-host-0.1.0.tgz"
SDK_TGZ="$PWD/release-artifacts/2026-03-09/chips-sdk-0.1.0.tgz"
CARDVIEWER_CPK="$PWD/Chips-CardViewer/dist/com.chips.card-viewer-0.1.0.cpk"
RICHTEXT_CPK="$PWD/Chips-BaseCardPlugin/richtext-BCP/dist/chips.basecard.richtext-0.1.0.cpk"

npm install -g "$HOST_TGZ" "$SDK_TGZ"

echo '== installed bins =='
which chips
which chipsdev

echo '== help =='
chips help
chipsdev help | sed -n '1,20p'

echo '== install plugins =='
chips plugin install "$CARDVIEWER_CPK"
chips plugin enable com.chips.card-viewer
chips plugin install "$RICHTEXT_CPK"
chips plugin enable chips.basecard.richtext

echo '== final plugin list =='
chips plugin list

echo '== final status =='
chips status
]
```
